languages.text: "Похоже на то. Скорость подтопления невелика, но совершенно непонятно, чем именно оно обусловлено".

traits.locale_text: глухо как в морге, ни врагов ни людей

languages.text: "It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."
languages.original_text: "Похоже на то. Скорость подтопления невелика, но совершенно непонятно, чем именно оно обусловлено".

traits.locale_text: "It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."
"It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."
"It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."

languages.text: 「そうのようです。水位は少しずつ上昇していますが、原因は不明です」
languages.original_text: "It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."

traits.locale_text: 「そうのようです。水位は少しずつ上昇していますが、原因は不明です。」

languages.text: «Eso parece. El nivel del agua sube gradualmente, pero no sabemos la causa».
languages.original_text: "It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."

traits.locale_text: «Eso parece. El nivel del agua sube gradualmente, pero no sabemos la causa».

languages.text: "Scheint so. Das Wasser steigt kontinuierlich, aber wir wissen nicht warum."
languages.original_text: "It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."

traits.locale_text: "Scheint so. Das Wasser steigt kontinuierlich, aber wir wissen nicht warum."

languages.text: « Il semblerait que ce soit effectivement le cas. L'eau ne cesse de monter, mais impossible d'en déterminer la cause. »
languages.original_text: "It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."

traits.locale_text: « Il semblerait que ce soit effectivement le cas. L'eau ne cesse de monter, mais impossible d'en déterminer la cause. »

languages.text: “看起来确实如此。水位正在逐步上升，但原因仍未查明。”
languages.original_text: "It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."

traits.locale_text: “看起来确实如此。水位正在逐步上升，但原因仍未查明。”

languages.text: "Öyle görünüyor. Su seviyesi kademeli olarak yükseliyor ancak sebebi hâlâ bilinmiyor."
languages.original_text: "It appears so. The water levels are rising incrementally, but the cause remains unknown."

traits.locale_text: "Öyle görünüyor. Su seviyesi kademeli olarak yükseliyor ancak sebebi hâlâ bilinmiyor."
